---
title: "PCAplot"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tximport)
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggrepel)
library(dplyr)
library(ggpattern)
library(scatterplot3d)
```

```{r}
dds <- readRDS("results/dds_all_samples.rds")
# Variance stabilizing transformation for visualization
vst <- vst(dds, blind = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# Your pca_data only has PC1 & PC2 by default — use prcomp directly
pca_full <- prcomp(t(assay(vst)))
summary(pca_full)      
```

```{r}
# Max PCs = min(nsamples - 1, ngenes)
ncol(vst)   # number of samples
nrow(vst)   # number of genes
# Max meaningful PCs = n_samples - 1
```

```{r}
rv <- rowVars(assay(vst))
select <- order(rv, decreasing = TRUE)[1:2]
pca_full <- prcomp(t(assay(vst)[select, ]))
summary(pca_full)   # should now match 69% / 16%
```

```{r}
for (n in c(100, 500, 1000, 5000, 10000, nrow(vst))) {
  pd <- plotPCA(vst, intgroup = "group", returnData = TRUE, ntop = n)
  pv <- round(100 * attr(pd, "percentVar"))
  cat("ntop =", n, "| PC1 =", pv[1], "% | PC2 =", pv[2], "%\n")
}
```

#plot PCA variance

```{r}
ntop_values <- c(100, 500, 1000, 5000, 10000, nrow(vst))

variance_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(ntop_values, function(n) {
  rv <- rowVars(assay(vst))
  select <- order(rv, decreasing = TRUE)[1:min(n, nrow(vst))]
  pca <- prcomp(t(assay(vst)[select, ]))
  pv <- round(100 * summary(pca)$importance[2, 1:3] * 100) / 100  
  data.frame(ntop = n, 
             PC = c("PC1", "PC2", "PC3"), 
             variance = c(pv[1], pv[2], pv[3]))
}))

# Plot
ntop_plot <- ggplot(variance_df, aes(x = ntop, y = variance, color = PC)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 500, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.5) +
  annotate("text", x = 600, y = 72, label = "n=500", 
           hjust = 0, size = 2.5, color = "grey40") +
  scale_x_log10(breaks = ntop_values, 
                labels = c("100", "500", "1k", "5k", "10k", "all")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("PC1" = "#D6604D", 
                                "PC2" = "#2166AC",
                                "PC3" = "#4DAC26")) +
  xlab("Top variable genes (log scale)") +
  ylab("Variance explained (%)") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 8) +       # smaller base font
  theme(
    legend.position    = "inside",
    legend.position.inside = c(0.85, 0.65),   # move legend inside plot
    legend.key.size    = unit(0.4, "cm"),
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 7),
    legend.title       = element_text(size = 7),
    legend.background  = element_rect(fill = alpha("white", 0.7), color = NA),
    plot.title         = element_blank(),      # drop title, use figure caption instead
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank()
  )
base_dir <- "~/Desktop/Thesis"

ggsave(file.path(base_dir, "figures/PCA_ntop_sensitivity.png"),
       ntop_plot, width = 3.5, height = 3, dpi = 300)
```

# Top 500 PCA

tissue: head=red body=blue color treatmetn: flutamide=with a dot inside pattern control=no dot day: 45=circle 103=triangle shape

```{r}
pca_data <- plotPCA(vst, intgroup = c("group", "tissue"), returnData = TRUE, ntop = 2)

# Add these lines immediately after
pca_data$treatment <- ifelse(grepl("flutamide", pca_data$group), "Flutamide", "Control")
pca_data$day       <- ifelse(grepl("day45",     pca_data$group), "Day 45",    "Day 103")

percent_var <- round(100 * attr(pca_data, "percentVar"))

pca_plot <- ggplot(pca_data, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2,
                                  color = tissue)) +
  # Layer 1 — all points hollow (control)
  geom_point(size = 4, stroke = 0.8, fill = "white", shape = 21) +
  # Layer 2 — flutamide only, filled
  geom_point(data = subset(pca_data, treatment == "Flutamide"),
             aes(fill = tissue), size = 4, stroke = 0.8, shape = 21) +
  # Day label on each point
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = paste0(name)), size = 2.5,
                show.legend  = FALSE,        # <-- add this
                max.overlaps = 20,
                segment.size = 0.3,
                segment.color = "grey60",
                box.padding = 0.4,
                point.padding = 0.3) +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: ", percent_var[1], "% variance")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: ", percent_var[2], "% variance")) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name   = "Tissue",
    values = c("body" = "#2166AC", "head" = "#D6604D"),
    labels = c("Body", "Head")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name   = "Tissue",
    values = c("body" = "#2166AC", "head" = "#D6604D"),
    labels = c("Body", "Head")
  ) +
  annotate("point", x = -55, y = 50, shape = 21, size = 4,
           color = "black", fill = "black") +
  annotate("point", x = -55, y = 43, shape = 21, size = 4,
           color = "black", fill = "white") +
  annotate("text", x = -52, y = 50, label = "Flutamide", hjust = 0, size = 2.8) +
  annotate("text", x = -52, y = 43, label = "Control",   hjust = 0, size = 2.8) +
  annotate("text", x = -57, y = 54, label = "Treatment", hjust = 0, size = 3,
           fontface = "bold") +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(shape  = 21, 
                                              fill   = "white", 
                                              stroke = 0.8,
                                              label  = "")),   # <-- empty label
    fill  = "none"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    legend.text      = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title     = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
    legend.key.size  = unit(0.4, "cm"),
    axis.title       = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.text        = element_text(size = 8),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

ggsave(file.path(base_dir, "figures/PCA_all_samples.png"),
       pca_plot, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
pca_plot
```


```{r}
# Sample distance heatmap
sample_dists <- dist(t(assay(vst)))
sample_dist_matrix <- as.matrix(sample_dists)

annotation_col <- data.frame(
  group   = colData$group,
  tissue  = colData$tissue,
  row.names = rownames(colData)
)

annotation_colors <- list(
  tissue = c("body" = "#2166AC",
             "head" = "#D6604D"),
  group  = c("control_day45"    = "#8C96C6",  # muted lavender
             "control_day103"   = "#88419D",  # deep purple
             "flutamide_day103" = "#238B45")  # forest green
)

png(file.path(base_dir, "figures/sample_distance_heatmap.png"),
    width = 1000, height = 800, res = 150)
pheatmap(sample_dist_matrix,
         clustering_distance_rows = sample_dists,
         clustering_distance_cols = sample_dists,
         annotation_col = annotation_col,
         annotation_colors = annotation_colors,
         color = colorRampPalette(rev(brewer.pal(9, "Greys")))(255))
dev.off()

cat("Sample distance heatmap saved\n")
```

```{r}
```


```{r}
vst <- vst(dds, blind = TRUE)
pca_data <- plotPCA(vst, intgroup = c("group", "tissue"), returnData = TRUE)
gmm_data <- pca_data[, c("PC1", "PC2")]
library(mclust)

gmm_2 <- Mclust(gmm_data, G = 2)
gmm_3 <- Mclust(gmm_data, G = 3)
```


```{r}
gmm_6 <- Mclust(gmm_data, G = 4)
```


```{r}
library(factoextra)

fviz_mclust(gmm_2, "classification", geom = "point")
fviz_mclust(gmm_3, "classification", geom = "point")
fviz_mclust(gmm_4, "classification", geom = "point")
```

```{r}
best_gmm <- Mclust(gmm_data)
best_gmm$G
```
